decision_reasons: source/vintage gate failed before performance evaluation
official Fed CP page says daily posting is usually 1:00 p.m. EST but explicitly not guaranteed
ALFRED vintage snapshots were reachable for some representative CP series but complete first-vintage mechanics were not proven across all required regimes
COMPOUT 2008 vintage probe fell back to the current 20260701 vintage, failing the required 2008 outstanding-history check
no bounded parser/source map was proven for the full outstanding plus AA financial/nonfinancial daily rate feature set

data.official_family: Federal Reserve Commercial Paper Rates and Outstanding release / Data Download Program
public_sources_checked: ALFRED graph CSV vintage snapshots for representative CP series
data.official_timing_text_summary: Data on CP issuance rates and volumes typically are updated daily and typically posted with a one-day lag; CP outstanding is usually Wednesday and month-end close of business and also posted with a one-day lag; daily CP release usually available at 1:00 p.m. EST, but the Federal Reserve Board makes no guarantee regarding timing.
data.market_data_source: Not used; stopped at source gate. No CSV-backed market data, daemon, or orders.

model_behavior.generate_signals: returns empty weights with rejected_source_gate metadata
